seoTitle: How to Set Up an Email Campaign in GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Follow these steps to build, design, and schedule an email campaign in GoHighLevel to reach and engage your audience effectively.
intro: Setting up an email campaign in GoHighLevel takes you from a blank list to a scheduled send that reaches your audience with the right message at the right time. This guide covers building your email list, designing your campaign, and scheduling it for delivery. It's useful for beginners just getting into email marketing as well as small business owners and marketers looking to make their outreach more consistent.

steps.heading: Create your email list
steps.body: Start by building or importing the list of contacts you want to reach with your campaign inside GoHighLevel.

steps.heading: Design your email campaign
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's campaign tools to design your email content, keeping your messaging aligned with the goal of the campaign, whether that's a promotion or an update.

steps.heading: Schedule your campaign for delivery
steps.body: Set the date and time you want your email to go out, planning around when your audience is most likely to engage.

steps.heading: Apply automation best practices
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's automation features to streamline follow-ups and repeat sends, reducing the manual work involved in ongoing campaigns.

steps.heading: Personalize with AI where it helps
steps.body: Leverage AI-assisted personalization to tailor messaging to different segments of your list, improving the odds your emails resonate.

faq.question: Do I need a large contact list to run an email campaign in GoHighLevel?
faq.answer: No, you can run a campaign with any size list, and GoHighLevel's tools work whether you're just starting to build your audience or already have a large one.

faq.question: Can I schedule an email campaign in advance?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel lets you schedule campaigns for a specific future date and time rather than sending immediately.

faq.question: How does automation help with email campaigns?
faq.answer: Automation can handle repetitive tasks like follow-up emails, freeing you up to focus on strategy rather than manually sending each message.

faq.question: Can small businesses personalize emails without a large team?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel's AI-assisted personalization features are designed to help even small teams tailor messaging without heavy manual effort.

faq.question: What if my campaign doesn't perform as expected?
faq.answer: Reviewing your list segmentation, messaging, and send timing are good starting points if a campaign isn't getting the engagement you hoped for.
